headline: Labcorp Launches Expanded DPYD Test to Identify Cancer Patients at Risk for Severe Chemotherapy Side Effects
summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services, today announced the availability of its expanded DPYD Genotyping test to help identify cancer patients who may be at increased risk for severe or life-threatening side effects from fluoropyrimidine chemotherapy. Labcorp now offers genotype testing for all DPYD Tier 1 and Tier 2 variants recommended by the Association for Molecular Pathology (AMP).

headline: Labcorp Announces Availability Of Expanded DPYD Genotyping Test To Help Identify Cancer Patients At Increased Risk For Severe Fluoropyrimidine Chemotherapy Side Effects
summary: New pharmacogenomic test detects all DPYD variants recommended by the Association for Molecular Pathology to support safer, more personalized cancer treatmentBURLINGTON, N.C., May 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp
